audit_items.proof_trace: At the throw-site (line 295), both resources[idx].contents and import_stack.back()->source alias the same allocation, violating single-owner semantics. However, Context::~Context() (lines 117-136) employs a deliberate two-phase cleanup: it frees allocations via resources[] first, then calls sass_import_take_source/sass_import_take_srcmap to nullify import_stack entry pointers before sass_delete_import — preventing any double-free. All exception paths from register_resource reach this destructor via sass_delete_compiler (sass_context.cpp:323), so no leak occurs in practice.
